steps: Dilute in 1000 ml distilled water: 50 g, Casein Hydrolysate 5 g, Peptic Digest from Animal Tissue (Peptone A) 20 g, Yeast Extract 4 g, Dextrose 1 g, Sodium Thioglycolate Final pH ( at 25°C) 7.0±0.2 Heat if necessary, to dissolve the medium completely.
Sterilize by autoclaving at 15 lbs pressure 121 °C for 00:15:00 .
Refrigerate 4 °C the sterile medium until use.
Pour 10 mL of media in sterile tubes.

Heat media in water bath 100 °C 00:10:00 OR alternative do a gass exchange using the gassing station for 3 minutes to each tube OR put tubes in to the anaerobic tent for 24:00:00 to 48:00:00 before inoculating.
creator: Ana Lara
